summary: Added a focused prompt-crop boundary fix so rendered question regions stop before later foreign question anchors detected on the same page.
test_results: Focused loop verification passed in the final session: 111 focused tests passed and 12 rendering-marker tests passed.
acceptance_criteria_status: Satisfied: later same-page foreign question anchors remove or trim prompt crop regions.
Satisfied: the fix reuses detect_question_anchor_candidates rather than ad hoc string matching.
repo_hygiene_notes: No generated outputs or canonical inputs were changed.
known_risks: The synthetic test does not prove full historical corpus coverage.
implementation_summary: Imported QuestionStart so image-rendering code can compare detected anchor candidates against the active question.
Extended _contains_other_question_start so missed standalone top-level anchors are treated as crop boundaries.
Added a regression test for a prompt crop that previously retained the next question.
behavior_change: Question prompt crop regions now stop before later top-level foreign question anchors on the same page, including anchors not present in the parsed question start list.
scope_control: No canonical output images or source PDFs were modified.
